title: Glass Shot Bottles with Lids - 12 Pack 120ml Empty Mini Bottles for Ginger Shots with Cleaning Brush & Labels - Reusable, Clear, Airtight - Ideal for Juice, Oils, Sauces, Medicine
features: WHAT'S INCLUDED - Each pack of mini bottles for ginger shots comes with 12 120ml shot bottles, and a handy cleaning brush, making these health shot bottles effortless to clean. With the included labels, organizing and identifying your concoctions has never been easier.

HIGH-QUALITY & FOOD-SAFE - Crafted from premium-quality, thick glass that is BPA-free and food safe, our glass shot bottles with lids are built to withstand the test of time, whilst providing peace of mind while enjoying your favourite beverages. The transparent design of these wellness shot bottles with lids allows for easy identification of contents, while the sturdy construction guarantees repeated use without compromise.

AIRTIGHT FRESHNESS ON THE MOVE - Bid farewell to messy spills and leaks with our meticulously designed small glass bottles with lids. Each shot bottle features a secure white screw cap that ensures airtight sealing, preserving the freshness and integrity of your liquids. Whether you're commuting to work or embarking on outdoor adventures, rest assured that these juice shot bottles with lids wont spill or leak in your bag!

ENDLESS POSSIBILITIES - Explore a multitude of applications with our ginger shot bottles with lids. From crafting invigorating ginger and carrot shots to creating your own wellness elixirs, these 120ml glass bottles are perfect for storing a variety of liquids. Whilst perfect for homemade sauces, potent extracts, or fragrant essential oils, these small bottles with lids are also perfect as pill bottles - store all of your medicines neatly and use the labels to keep them organised!

COMPACT AND CONVENIENT - Additionally, the mini glass bottles with lids are dishwasher-safe, simplifying the cleaning process and ensuring they're always ready for your next adventure. The petite size of these mini shot bottles for ginger shots makes them a perfect fit for fridge compartments, ensuring they're always within arm's reach when you need a quick pick-me-up.
description: Product Description Wide Mouth Design The wide mouth design allows for easy spill-proof refills, be it for travel or for everyday essentials such as spices, medicines, detox shots and more! Easy Cleaning The included cleaning brush, coupled with the wide mouth design makes these shot bottles effortless to clean. Better yet, they are also dishwasher safe (Not including the lids). Customisable The provided labels and pen let you personalise and organise your bottles, making it easy to view and sort them, especially with the clear glass design. HEFTMAN Glass Shot Bottles with Lids - 12 Pack, 120ml with Cleaning Brush & Labels Elevate your beverage game with our small shot bottles with lids 120ml - 12 Pack, your ultimate solution for versatile and convenient liquid storage. Crafted from premium-quality, thick glass, these shot glasses with lids are not only durable but also food-safe and BPA-free, ensuring the utmost safety for your beverages. The capacity of these 120ml bottles makes them perfect for a variety of uses, from crafting invigorating ginger and beetroot shots, storing flavoured oils and spirits, to using them as medicine bottles. The leak-proof design, complete with secure white screw caps, ensures airtight sealing, preserving the freshness of your liquids and preventing messy spills, whether you need these glass juice bottles with lids for on the go, or storing them in your fridge door for easy access. Dishwasher-safe materials ensure effortless cleaning for repeated use. The transparent design of these ginger shot glasses allows for quick identification of contents, while the labels provided aid in organization. Upgrade your liquid storage solutions today with our shot glass bottles with lids - 12 Pack, where quality, convenience, and versatility meet in one sleek package.
